summary: Costco 21.4% cheaper than WMT on groceries; gaining share faster than any major rival. Amazon investing ~$200B CapEx in 2026 vs WMT $25B. WMT eComm surged 27% to 23% of net sales. Target struggling — new CEO Fiddelke, shrinking sales. WMT piloting 3P marketplace backroom storage in Dallas for same-day delivery. WMT generating $14.92B FCF vs Amazon's higher CapEx spend.
